testcase.name: @BeforeMethod setUp

failure.message: EdgeDriver not found at: C:\Users\2389193\eclipse-workspace\test1\drivers\msedgedriver.exe Provide -DedgeDriverPath=... or place it at ./drivers/msedgedriver.exe (version must match Edge).

testcase.failure: java.lang.RuntimeException: EdgeDriver not found at: C:\Users\2389193\eclipse-workspace\test1\drivers\msedgedriver.exe Provide -DedgeDriverPath=... or place it at ./drivers/msedgedriver.exe (version must match Edge). at driver.DriverFactory.launchEdgeFromLocal(DriverFactory.java:101) at driver.DriverFactory.createEdge(DriverFactory.java:91) at driver.DriverFactory.initDriver(DriverFactory.java:23) at base.BaseTest.setUp(BaseTest.java:15) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) ...
